events.title: Publication of Advertisement
events.description: Official advertisement published on ACPC website and newspapers.

events.title: Awareness Program for UG Courses
events.description: State-wide awareness sessions conducted for UG engineering course admissions.

events.title: Commencement of Registration
events.description: Registration portal opens at 2 PM. Create your account, fill personal & academic details, upload photo and signature.

events.title: Last Date of Registration & Fee Payment
events.description: Final deadline to complete online registration and pay the registration fees.

events.title: Publication of Revised Final List of Institutes & Seat Matrix
events.description: Finalized list of participating institutes along with seat matrix published.

events.title: Declaration of Provisional Merit List
events.description: Provisional merit list declared based on GUJCET / JEE scores.

events.title: Choice Filling for Mock Round
events.description: Fill and alter your college and branch preferences for the mock admission round.

events.title: Declaration of Mock Round Result
events.description: Mock allotment result published. No confirmation required — for reference only.

events.title: Declaration of Final Merit List
events.description: Final merit list declared and published on the ACPC portal.

events.title: Consent & Choice Filling – Round 1
events.description: Give consent for participation and fill/alter college & branch preferences for Round 1 admission.

events.title: Declaration of Round 1 Allotment List
events.description: First round seat allotment result announced. Check your allotted college and branch.

events.title: Token Fee Payment & Admission Letter – Round 1
events.description: Pay token tuition fees online and download your admission letter.

events.title: Commencement of Academic Term
events.description: First day of the new academic year at all ACPC-affiliated engineering institutes.

events.title: Online Cancellation of Admission – Round 1
events.description: Window to cancel your Round 1 allotment if you wish to try for a better option in later rounds.

events.title: Display of Vacancy After Round 1
events.description: Remaining vacant seats after Round 1 confirmations and cancellations displayed.

events.title: Online Registration for Non-Registered Candidates
events.description: New registration window for candidates who hadn't registered earlier, for available seats.

events.title: Publication of Revised Merit List
events.description: Updated merit list published after result improvements from various boards.

events.title: Consent & Choice Filling – Round 2
events.description: Fill or update your college and branch preferences for the second round of allotment.

events.title: Declaration of Round 2 Allotment List
events.description: Second round seat allotment result announced at 2 PM.

events.title: Token Fee Payment & Admission Letter – Round 2
events.description: Pay token tuition fees and generate admission letter for Round 2 allotment.

events.title: Online Withdrawal of Admission – Round 2
events.description: Last chance to withdraw from Round 2 allotment before final confirmation.

events.title: Display of Final Vacancy After Round 2
events.description: Vacant seats after Round 2 published for Round 3 candidates.

events.title: Consent & Choice Filling – Round 3
events.description: Fill or alter choices for the third round of seat allotment.

events.title: Declaration of Round 3 Allotment List
events.description: Third round seat allotment result published.

events.title: Token Fee Payment & Admission Letter – Round 3
events.description: Pay token fees and download admission letter for Round 3.

events.title: Online Cancellation of Admission – Round 3
events.description: Window to cancel Round 3 allotment.

events.title: Display of Vacancy After Round 3
events.description: Remaining vacant seats after Round 3 published.

events.title: Last Date of Reporting at Institute & Fee Payment
events.description: Final deadline to report to your allotted institute and pay remaining tuition fees.

events.title: Choice Filling – Online Round (Govt & GIA)
events.description: Consent and choice filling for online round specifically for Government and Grant-in-Aid institutes.

events.title: Declaration of Allotment – Online Round (Govt & GIA)
events.description: Allotment result for Government and GIA institutes online round declared.

events.title: Token Fee Payment – Online Round (Govt & GIA)
events.description: Pay token fees and generate admission letter for Govt/GIA online round.

events.title: Registration for Vacant Seats – Govt / GIA (Non-Allotment)
events.description: Tentative: registration window for candidates seeking admission to remaining vacant seats in Government and GIA institutes.

events.title: Publication of Merit for Vacant Seats – Govt / GIA (Non-Allotment)
events.description: Tentative: merit list published for candidates applying to vacant Govt/GIA seats.

events.title: Counselling for Vacant Seats – Govt / GIA (Non-Allotment)
events.description: Tentative: physical counselling conducted for remaining vacant seats in Government and GIA institutes.

notes: These are provisional dates based on expected declarations from various boards, entrance exams, seat approvals, and JoSAA counselling.
All activities are time-bound. Candidates must complete them by logging in at www.gujacpc.admissions.nic.in.
Candidates are advised to visit the official website regularly for any schedule changes or further information.
